en: "At that time the LORD said to me, 'Cut for yourself two tablets of stone like the first, and come up to me on the mountain and make an ark of wood.
zh: “那時，耶和華對我說：‘你要鑿出兩塊石版，和先前的一樣，然後上山到我這裡來；又要做一個木櫃。

en: And I will write on the tablets the words that were on the first tablets that you broke, and you shall put them in the ark.'
zh: 我要把你摔碎的先前那兩塊版上的話，寫在這兩塊版上；你要把它們放在櫃中。’

en: So I made an ark of acacia wood, and cut two tablets of stone like the first, and went up the mountain with the two tablets in my hand.
zh: 於是我用皂莢木做了一個櫃，又鑿出了兩塊石版，和先前的一樣；然後我手裡拿著這兩塊石版，上山去了。

en: And he wrote on the tablets, in the same writing as before, the ten commandments that the LORD had spoken to you on the mountain out of the midst of the fire on the day of the assembly. And the LORD gave them to me.
zh: 耶和華把先前所寫的，就是在集會的日子，在山上從火中告訴你們的十誡，都寫在這兩塊版上；耶和華把石版交給了我。

en: Then I turned and came down from the mountain and put the tablets in the ark that I had made. And there they are, as the LORD commanded me."
zh: 於是我轉身從山上下來，把石版放在我所做的櫃中，照著耶和華吩咐我的，現在石版還放在那裡。

en: (The people of Israel journeyed from Beeroth Bene-jaakan to Moserah. There Aaron died, and there he was buried. And his son Eleazar ministered as priest in his place.
zh: “以色列人從比羅比尼．亞干起程，到了摩西拉。亞倫在那裡死了，也埋葬在那裡；他的兒子以利亞撒接替他供祭司的職分。

en: From there they journeyed to Gudgodah, and from Gudgodah to Jotbathah, a land with brooks of water.
zh: 他們從那裡起程，到了谷歌大，又從谷歌大到約巴他，就是多溪水的地。

en: At that time the LORD set apart the tribe of Levi to carry the ark of the covenant of the LORD to stand before the LORD to minister to him and to bless in his name, to this day.
zh: 那時，耶和華把利未支派分別出來，叫他們抬耶和華的約櫃，侍立在耶和華面前事奉他，並且奉他的名祝福，直到今日。

en: Therefore Levi has no portion or inheritance with his brothers. The LORD is his inheritance, as the LORD your God said to him.)
zh: 所以利未人在兄弟中無分無業；照著耶和華你的 神應許他的，耶和華自己就是他的產業。

en: "I myself stayed on the mountain, as at the first time, forty days and forty nights, and the LORD listened to me that time also. The LORD was unwilling to destroy you.
zh: “我又像以前那樣，在山上停留了四十晝夜；那一次耶和華也聽了我的呼求，他不願把你毀滅。

en: And the LORD said to me, 'Arise, go on your journey at the head of the people, so that they may go in and possess the land, which I swore to their fathers to give them.'
zh: 耶和華對我說：‘你起來，走在人民的前面，使他們可以進去，得著我向他們列祖起誓賜給他們的那地。’

en: "And now, Israel, what does the LORD your God require of you, but to fear the LORD your God, to walk in all his ways, to love him, to serve the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul,
zh: “以色列啊，現在耶和華你的 神向你要的是甚麼呢？只要你敬畏耶和華你的 神，行在他的一切道路上，愛他，一心一意事奉耶和華你的 神，

en: and to keep the commandments and statutes of the LORD, which I am commanding you today for your good?
zh: 遵守耶和華的誡命和律例，就是我今日吩咐你的，為要叫你得福。

en: Behold, to the LORD your God belong heaven and the heaven of heavens, the earth with all that is in it.
zh: 看哪，天和天上的天，地和地上的一切都是屬於耶和華你的 神的。

en: Yet the LORD set his heart in love on your fathers and chose their offspring after them, you above all peoples, as you are this day.
zh: 但耶和華只喜悅你的列祖，愛他們；他從萬民中揀選了他們的後裔，就是你們，像今日一樣。

en: Circumcise therefore the foreskin of your heart, and be no longer stubborn.
zh: 所以你們要給你們的心行割禮，不可再頑固。

en: For the LORD your God is God of gods and Lord of lords, the great, the mighty, and the awesome God, who is not partial and takes no bribe.
zh: 因為耶和華你們的 神，他是萬神之神、萬主之主、偉大有力和可畏的 神；他不徇情面，也不受賄賂。

en: He executes justice for the fatherless and the widow, and loves the sojourner, giving him food and clothing.
zh: 他為孤兒寡婦伸張正義，又把衣食給寄居的人。

en: Love the sojourner, therefore, for you were sojourners in the land of Egypt.
zh: 所以你們要愛寄居的人，因為你們在埃及地也作過寄居的人。

en: You shall fear the LORD your God. You shall serve him and hold fast to him, and by his name you shall swear.
zh: 你要敬畏耶和華你的 神，事奉他，依靠他，奉他的名起誓。

en: He is your praise. He is your God, who has done for you these great and terrifying things that your eyes have seen.
zh: 他是你當頌讚的；他是你的 神，他為你作了那些大而可畏的事，就是你親眼見過的。

en: Your fathers went down to Egypt seventy persons, and now the LORD your God has made you as numerous as the stars of heaven.
zh: 你的列祖下到埃及的時候，一共不過七十人，現在耶和華你的 神卻使你的人數像天上的星那麼多了。”
